goal: Unify the visual identity of the Signal Tree (/graph/flow) with the Neural Lattice (/graph) while implementing advanced graph intelligence and high-scale performance optimizations.
success_criteria: Nodes in /graph/flow implement glassmorphism design with dynamic glow effects tied to node type-colors.
Edges in /graph/flow are replaced with animated SVG signal paths with speed modulated by node importance.
The BFS transformer identifies and flags cyclic edges for rendering instead of discarding them.
A 'View in Lattice' trigger in the 2D flow successfully executes a camera 'fly-to' animation in the 3D engine.
BFS tree transformation is offloaded to a Web Worker, ensuring zero main-thread blocking during large graph loads.
Dagre layout calculations are memoized using the graph fingerprint to prevent redundant re-renders.
constraints: No silent scope expansion: every step must map to explicit success criteria IDs.
Keep updates in the state store instead of chat-only planning.
Prefer small, testable tasks with explicit completion criteria.
